title: acronia drewii
intro: Acronia drewii, also known as the Drew's Acronia, is a species of plant in the family Theaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Acronia drewii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, offering potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion.
